summary: Calendar syncs automatically in the background on a fixed schedule.

changed: Calendar sync runs automatically every 2 minutes (configurable in settings), even when you are not on the Calendar tab
Background sync uses the same full pipeline as Sync Calendar — web session poll, iCal fetch, and merge — not cookies alone
Embedded calendar pollers refresh every 60 seconds while Nucleus is running
fixed: Working-location and all-day events sync without requiring a time range or weekday in the label
Bare titles like "Home" or "Office" are accepted and treated as today’s all-day entries
